name: onstwedder.github.io
body:
### onstwedder.com
## Martijn

Hi, I'm Martijn Onstwedder.
I was born in 1974 in the Netherlands.

I started working in IT in 1998 at a small company specialised in Delphi and Pascal. After that I moved to a one of the largest Dutch Insurance Company. I've worked there since in different specialties concerning IT. Lately i'm mostly concerned with connectivity.

In my spare time I have been developing ever since I was young. I started on a ZX Spectrum way back when.
A couple of years ago started with iOS development and two years ago i swapped to SWIFT.
note: Don't delete this file! It's used internally to help with page regeneration.
